home.heroTitle: Grow a world of your own
home.heroSubtitle: Wander a living gallery, then plant, shape, and share your own 3D nature space — right in your browser.
home.sectionGalleryBody: Photographs drift among leaves and light. Move your cursor and the whole grove leans in to meet you.
home.sectionCreateBody: Place trees, rocks, flowers and ponds. Set the wind, wake the butterflies, and let the sun cross your sky.
home.sectionShareBody: Join Natura to save your spaces, return to them anytime, and open them to other wanderers.

footer.tagline: A living corner of the internet.

auth.signInSubtitle: Your spaces have kept growing while you were away.
auth.signUpSubtitle: Create an account to save your spaces and share them.
auth.checkEmail: Almost there — check your email to confirm your account.
auth.notConfigured: Accounts aren't available yet. Please try again later.

editor.plantHint: Click the ground to plant it. Esc to stop.

gallery.hint: Click a picture to come closer
